items.title: Top Research Reports for JPMorgan, Johnson & Johnson & Applied Materials
items.description: JPMorgan targets 9% NII growth, Johnson and Johnson leans on new drugs and MedTech strength, and Applied Materials rides a semiconductor rebound despite rising risks.

items.title: JNJ Seeks Label Expansion of Multiple Myeloma Drug Tecvayli in the EU
items.description: Johnson & Johnson seeks EMA nod to expand Tecvayli monotherapy use in earlier-line RRMM, backed by phase III MajesTEC-9 data showing strong survival gains.

items.title: What Happens to Dividend Income When the Next Recession Hits
items.description: Recession fears have a way of making income investors second-guess everything, and if dividends are paid out of cash flow, and cash flow shrinks during economic downturns, it only seems logical that dividend income will fall right alongside stock prices. This concern is understandable, especially for retirees who depend on those payouts to cover real ... What Happens to Dividend Income When the Next Recession Hits

items.title: Hope for the Best and Plan for the Worst: The 5 Safest Dividend Aristocrats
items.description: The stock market could face serious trouble in 2026 as extreme valuations collide with geopolitical tensions, AI investment skepticism, and policy headwinds. The Warren Buffett indicator has surged to about 220%, far above levels seen before past market declines, suggesting stocks may be detached from economic fundamentals, and that may be one of the major ... Hope for the Best and Plan for the Worst: The 5 Safest Dividend Aristocrats

items.title: ETFs With Yields Above 10% Using Completely Different Strategies
items.description: With the federal funds rate sitting at 3.75% and the 10-year Treasury yielding 4.13%, investors hunting for meaningful income have to venture well beyond government bonds. Three ETFs currently delivering above 10% yields do so through mechanisms that have almost nothing in common with each other, which makes them worth understanding on their own terms ... ETFs With Yields Above 10% Using Completely Different Strategies
